case_title: PARKMERCED INVESTORS PROPERTIES LLC VS. ALBERT VAN DRUFF et al

docket_entries.description: EX PARTE APPLICATION FOR ORDER FOR STAY OF EXECUTION, POINTS AND AUTHORITIES FILED BY DEFENDANT DRUFF, ALBERT VAN ,AN INDIVIDUAL

MASTER CALENDAR MOTION ON MAY-11-2011 IN DEPT. 206, HEARING ON APPLICANT/DEFENDANT ALBERT DRUFF'S WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS. NO APPEARANCE BY APPLICANT. THE COURT DENIES THE APPLICATION IN WHOLE. ORDER SIGNED, AND ENDORSED-FILED COPY MAILED TO APPLICANT. JUDGE: MARLA J. MILLER; CLERK: E. BURA; MATTER NOT REPORTED. (206)

SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF PARKMERCED INVESTORS PROPERTIES LLC A DELAWARE LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY SERVED MAR-06-2011, PRE-JUDGEMENT CLAIM OF RIGHT AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 THROUGH 10, INCLUSIVE
